seo.title: Features — RankPilot | Every SEO & Content Tool You Need
seo.description: RankPilot packs over a dozen specialized SEO and content tools into one cohesive platform. Keyword research, AI article generation, content grading, position tracking, and more.

hero.headline: Every Tool You Need to
hero.subheadline: RankPilot packs over a dozen specialized SEO and content tools into one cohesive platform. Here is a detailed look at everything included in your subscription.

research.title: Deep Research, Actionable Insights
research.desc: Eight specialized tools that help you understand your market, track your competition, and find the highest-value opportunities for your content.

tools.title: Keyword Research
tools.desc: Discover high-value keywords with volume, difficulty, CPC, and trend data. Filter by intent type, explore question-based keywords, and export results for your content strategy.

tools.title: Keyword Auditor
tools.desc: Analyze any URL for keyword density, placement, and on-page SEO factors. Get a comprehensive score with specific recommendations for meta titles, descriptions, headings, and body content.

tools.title: Competitor Analyzer
tools.desc: Break down any competitor URL to reveal word count, read time, heading structure, internal and external links, target keywords, and content quality metrics.

tools.title: Position Tracker
tools.desc: Monitor your keyword rankings over time with a threat leaderboard that scores competitors. Track position distribution across Top 3, Top 5, and Top 10 results.

tools.title: GSC Analyzer
tools.desc: Connect your Google Search Console to unlock near-jump keywords, zero-click pages, cannibalization detection, and keyword clustering — all from your real search data.

tools.title: Keyword Insights
tools.desc: Upload keyword exports from any tool. RankPilot scores each keyword by opportunity, groups them into clusters, and provides prioritized action recommendations.

tools.title: Thin Content Scanner
tools.desc: Identify pages with weak depth, missing structure, or low topical coverage. Get specific recommendations to strengthen existing content instead of always creating new pages.

tools.title: Header Extractor
tools.desc: Pull the complete heading structure from any URL to understand content hierarchy. Use this to plan better outlines and identify structural gaps in competitor content.

planning.title: Turn Data Into a Content Roadmap
planning.desc: Bridge the gap between research and execution. These tools help you organize your findings into a structured content plan that your team can follow.

tools.title: Content Ideas
tools.desc: Generate and save content ideas based on your keyword research. Each idea includes a suggested title, target keyword, and content angle to keep your pipeline full.

tools.title: Topic Clusters
tools.desc: Organize keywords and content ideas into strategic topic clusters. Visualize the relationship between pillar content and supporting articles to build topical authority.

tools.title: Editorial Calendar
tools.desc: Plan and schedule your content production with a visual calendar. Track article status from idea to draft to published, and keep your team aligned on deadlines.

creation.title: Create Content That Ranks and Converts
creation.desc: From AI-powered article generation to content grading, these tools ensure every piece of content you publish is optimized for both search engines and your target audience.

tools.title: AI Article Generator
tools.desc: Generate fully optimized, long-form articles using AI that understands your brand voice, ideal customer profile, and citation requirements. Configure word count, tone, internal linking, and AEO formatting.

tools.title: Outline Builder
tools.desc: Create detailed article outlines from scratch or enhance existing ones. The AI suggests heading structures, key points, and content flow based on top-ranking competitors.

tools.title: Content Grader
tools.desc: Score any piece of content against SEO best practices. Get detailed feedback on keyword usage, readability, structure, and optimization opportunities before publishing.

tools.title: Article Manager
tools.desc: Organize all your generated content in one place. Search, filter by project, view word counts, and manage article status. Each article includes an ICP compliance check.

brand.title: Your Brand, Your Rules
brand.desc: RankPilot's project system lets you manage multiple clients or brands with unique voice settings, audience profiles, and content standards for each one.

tools.title: Brand Voice Configuration
tools.desc: Define your writing style, tone, and personality. Every article generated will match your brand's unique voice consistently across all content.

tools.title: Ideal Customer Profiles
tools.desc: Set up detailed ICPs so generated content speaks directly to your target audience. Define demographics, pain points, goals, and preferred communication style.

tools.title: Citation Library
tools.desc: Upload trusted sources and reference documents. The AI will incorporate relevant citations from your approved sources, ensuring factual accuracy and credibility.

tools.title: Custom CTAs & Cross-Check
tools.desc: Define call-to-action templates and reference documents for fact-checking. Every article can be validated against your approved content before publishing.

comparison.title: One Platform vs. Four Separate Tools
comparison.desc: Most SEO workflows require stitching together Semrush, Jasper, Frase, and a spreadsheet. RankPilot replaces all of them with a single, connected workflow.

whyUs.title: No Tool Switching
whyUs.desc: Research, plan, generate, grade, and track — all in one platform. No copy-pasting between tabs.

whyUs.title: Built for Real SEO Workflows
whyUs.desc: Every feature was designed around how SEO professionals actually work, not how AI companies think they work.

whyUs.title: Unique to RankPilot
whyUs.desc: Cross Check, Negative Keywords, ICP, and internal linking via sitemap are features you won't find anywhere else.

cta.title: Ready to See It in Action?
cta.desc: Start your free trial and explore every tool with your own data. No credit card required.
